description: Canonical sources for the weekly cursor-feature-scout briefing. Add/remove URLs here to change what the skill tracks; do not hardcode sources in the SKILL.md. Briefings are team-neutral reference material — they describe what changed and what it practically enables, without correlating to any specific teammate's work.

intuit_ecosystem.finriskai: watch finriskai-agent-all channel for AI skill shipments

tracked_capabilities.name: Live editing in HTML pages
tracked_capabilities.what_it_enables: Editing rendered HTML artifacts directly instead of regenerating from source. Useful for any workflow where the HTML output is the deliverable.

tracked_capabilities.name: Inline commenting in HTML
tracked_capabilities.what_it_enables: Per-section feedback on HTML artifacts without leaving the artifact or round-tripping through a separate comments tool.

tracked_capabilities.name: Dashboard-level HTML capabilities
tracked_capabilities.what_it_enables: Interactive, filterable views shared via URL instead of static screenshots. Replaces hand-rolled HTML+JS with first-party components.

tracked_capabilities.name: New MCPs relevant to analytics work
tracked_capabilities.what_it_enables: Expands the surface of data and tools agents can reach. Priority signals: Databricks, Tableau, Camunda, Atlassian, DDE, GitHub, Glean, Slack MCP updates.

tracked_capabilities.name: New Cursor chat / compose features
tracked_capabilities.what_it_enables: Changes to how prompts and multi-turn workflows are structured. Background agents enable unattended long-running tasks.

tracked_capabilities.name: New Claude Code modes
tracked_capabilities.what_it_enables: Changes the decision of when to use Claude Code vs Cursor for different task types. Installable skills affect how skills are packaged and distributed.
